programmes.show_description: Prescription Heroine: Lois becomes addicted to painkillers prescribed for Brian after he gets hurt, and Peter's new table tennis table becomes a local hit.
Mister Act: Anarchic animated sitcom. When Peter has an accident that leaves him with a high-pitched voice, Jesus helps him fend off the other choirboys.
The Three Fs: US animated comedy series. Francine's newfound friendship with a frog brings excitement to the whole Smith household, but it also drives their neighbour Greg crazy.
Beyond the Alcove Or: How I Learned to Stop Worrying And Love Klaus: US animated comedy series. Klaus gets a new sense of mojo and becomes cool, but he makes Francine jealous too.
Jade in the Shade: Animated comedy. Linda and Louise stumble into a treasure-hunting adventure during a historical tour, and Bob, Tina and Gene host a group of street performers.
Fraud of the Dead: Docu-Pocalypse: Animated comedy. A documentary film profiling about Louise's superhuman archery skills is interrupted by some unexpectedly hungry visitors.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
Wrong with the Wind / Pigs' Feet / Moody at the Movies: Animated series. Porky wishes people would 'leaf' him alone, Daffy performs a magic 'feet', and a family of bears ruin a film.
Boardwalk Bunny / Crossbow / Cat Fished: Animated series. Yosemite Sam runs crooked carnival games, Elmer Fudd's crossbow leaves him cross, and Granny's got a hot date.
Duck Chocolate / Lead Foot / Bunny and the Beast: Animated series. Daffy Duck tries to sample a gift of chocolate from Porky Pig, and Bugs Bunny is picked up by Mrs Gruesome Gorilla.
Gremlin on a Plane: Animated adventure series. The gang has seats on the largest airplane ever to fly - unfortunately, the plane is also beset by a gremlin bent on sabotaging it!
Where There's A Will, There's A Wraith: Animated adventure series. A rich man writes Scooby into his will, but the gang must spend the night in a creepy mansion to benefit from it.
Ash, Isabel and Helen all hope to impress cleaner and musician Jodie from Milton Keynes with their style choices.
The drama continues in Essex with Ella questioning Jodie's loyalty, Elma organising a surprise 30th birthday bash redo for Courtney, and Amy's brother Wills arriving on the scene.
There is cause for celebration in Essex as Dani finally passes her driving test, but Saff's decision to throw a congratulatory party for her goes wrong when she invites Junaid.
Love is in the air in Essex as it's Junaid and Joe's one-year anniversary, Saff, Ella, Elma and Wills play padel, and Amy and Jordan host an intervention for Harry and Saff.
Stephen Mulhern hosts another episode of the exciting and iconic gameshow as a brave contestant takes on the infamous Banker for a chance at winning a life-changing cash prize.
Stephen Mulhern hosts as a brave contestant takes on the infamous Banker in the exciting and iconic gameshow and could be in with the chance of winning a life-changing cash prize.
Part-animated family adventure comedy film sequel featuring the voice of Michael J Fox and starring Geena Davis, 2002. Stuart and Snowbell travel across New York to save a friend.

The auditions return to Blackpool's Winter Gardens as further acts take to the stage with performances to impress the crowd and judges, Simon, Amanda, Alesha and KSI.
Animated comedy film featuring the voices of Matthew McConaughey and Reese Witherspoon, 2016. A theatre impresario koala has one chance to restore his theatre to its former glory.

Animated comedy film featuring the voices of Matthew McConaughey and Reese Witherspoon, 2016. A theatre impresario koala has one chance to restore his theatre to its former glory.
Anarchic musical comedy film starring Jack Black and Joan Cusack, 2003. A slobbish guitarist poses as a supply teacher but ends up moulding his pupils to become rock music gods.

Anarchic musical comedy film starring Jack Black and Joan Cusack, 2003. A slobbish guitarist poses as a supply teacher but ends up moulding his pupils to become rock music gods.
Slapstick comedy film sequel starring Ben Stiller and Teri Polo, 2010. The ambitious Greg Focker tries to step up to the plate when his father-in-law Jack looks for a successor.

Slapstick comedy film sequel starring Ben Stiller and Teri Polo, 2010. The ambitious Greg Focker tries to step up to the plate when his father-in-law Jack looks for a successor.
The Chicken or the Meg: Anarchic animated sitcom. Meg dates a chicken that she meets on a reality dating show and decides to move out when Peter disapproves of their relationship.
All About Alana: Anarchic animated sitcom. Lois' piano student Alana comes to work for the Griffins... and turns out to have sinister intentions.
The Lois Quagmire: Anarchic animated sitcom. Lois takes Quagmire to her high school reunion instead of Peter, and the other Griffins try to cover up a pizza delivery man's death.
Smooshed: A Love Story: US animated comedy series. Steve goes on a class trip to Philadelphia in a bid to fall in love.
A Song of Knives and Fire: US animated comedy series. Francine begins to start fires in order to make Stan's new firefighting job more exciting, and Roger becomes a knife-thrower.
Justin Junior: Sitcom about three young men who reside in ancient Rome. Grumio meets the father who left him on a hill as a baby, and who now wants to make up for lost time.
Uniform: Sitcom set in a fictional police training college. The excited recruits get to wear their uniforms for the first time and Dev reveals a deeply personal issue to Steph.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
Graveyard Goofs: Animated series inspired by the classic Looney Tunes shorts. Daffy Duck and Porky Pig take a dear friend to a final resting place.
Hex Appeal: Animated series inspired by the classic Looney Tunes shorts. Witch Hazel chases down an ingredient for a spell.
Inn for Trouble: Animated series inspired by the classic Looney Tunes shorts. Sylvester finds a suspicious motel.
Mummy Dummy: Animated series inspired by the classic Looney Tunes shorts. Bugs Bunny meets a mummy.
Animated series based on the superhero team. The Titans make wishes on a wishbone, but they must travel to Gobble-Gobble Land to set things right when it gets broken.
Sorcerer Snack Scare: Animated adventure series. Shaggy and Scooby discover a new favourite food as the gang investigates the mystery of a frightening Sorcerer at a snack factory!
Saga of the Swamp Beast: Animated adventure series. The gang's trip to a bayou is ruined by a shambling swamp beast that's scaring away anyone who dares to enter its soggy domain!
Tucker from the East Midlands is hoping to be impressed by the style choices of three single ladies.
Patrick, Sheldon and Liam compete for the affections of Leeds singleton Elli. Which of the three shoppers' fashion choices will win them a date?
Stephen Mulhern hosts as another of his brave contestants takes on the infamous Banker in the exciting and iconic gameshow for a chance of winning a life-changing cash prize.
The exciting and iconic gameshow hosted by Stephen Mulhern continues with a brave contestant taking on the infamous Banker for a chance at winning a life-changing cash prize.
Reality game show where celebrities cause chaos to win money for unsuspecting contestants of fake TV shows! Legendary Lioness Jill Scott is this week's rebellious Guest Saboteur.
Aisling Bea, Chris Packham, and Kate Lawler join Stephen Mulhern hoping to 'say what they see' and guess well-known phrases for a chance to win 50,000 pounds for their charities.
Animated short based on the popular Ice Age film franchise. Business is booming at Sid's new egg-sitting service, but a dastardly pirate bunny has plans for Sid's eggs.
Part-animated comedy starring James Marsden, 2011. The Easter Bunny's teenage son heads to Hollywood and is determined to become a drummer in a rock 'n' roll band.
